meaning: n.产物,农产品vt.提出,出示,生产,制造,结(果实),引起,招致,创作
examples: We sell only fresh local produce.
The shop sells only fresh local produce.
The produce was labelled "Made in China."
They're likely to be less mechanised, and to produce goods that command higher prices.
This year the U.S. was supposed to produce 100 million gallons of the stuff.
